decisions.reasoning: WWDC 2026 (June 8) disappointed: Siri AI rebuilt on licensed Google Gemini with no firm full-rollout timeline, no EU/China launch. Stock has sold off from entry ~$313 to $290 (-7.3%). The catalyst has already fired; selling into today macro risk-off would be poor timing. SMA signal remains long (fast 305.73 > slow 297.49). Bull case $400 (Wedbush Outperform), bear floor $215 (AI premium unwind from 36x to ~29x PE). Holding to reassess once fall product launch timeline is clarified.

sources.headline: Apple Stock Slips After WWDC 2026: Wall Street Splits Between a $400 Bull Case and a $215 Floor
Apple Stock (AAPL) Declines Over 3% After WWDC 2026 Announcement
Apple Stock After WWDC 2026: $400 Bull vs $215 Bear Case

decisions.invalidation: Siri AI launch further delayed past fall 2026, formal antitrust action on Google-Siri deal, or AAPL breaks below $270 on volume — would revisit trimming or closing

decisions.reasoning: Strong Q3 FY2026 earnings beat driven by cloud and AI growth. Known headwinds (FTC bundling investigation, Trump AI exec order, Reid Hoffman board departure) are already embedded in a 12% YTD decline. Stock pulled back 3 consecutive days to $403 but fundamentals remain intact. SMA signal long (fast 426.88 > slow 419.19).

sources.headline: Why Microsoft Stock Is Sinking Today
Microsoft Corp Stock (MSFT) Moved Down by 3.61% on Jun 2

decisions.invalidation: FTC investigation escalates to formal enforcement action, or cloud revenue growth decelerates meaningfully in Q4 FY26 report

decisions.reasoning: Exceptional FY2026 fundamentals: revenue $215.94B (+65% YoY), earnings +65% YoY. Strong Buy consensus from 38 analysts; 12-month target $298 (+45% upside from $205). Apple signed on as AI client (Siri/Gemini GPU workloads). SMA signal turned flat (fast 213.36 < slow 214.21) — bearish advisory, but single-day crossover with this fundamental backdrop is not a sell trigger. Bear risk: AI capex sustainability ($660B capex vs. $140B end-user revenues), multiple compression scenario to $150 in macro bear case.

decisions.invalidation: Hyperscaler capex guidance cuts from MSFT/AMZN/GOOGL, or US export control expansion blocks China shipments materially

decisions.reasoning: Only green position (+0.43%). Broad market anchor providing diversification. SMA signal long. Holding as portfolio stabilizer. Macro risk-off today (US-Iran escalation, CPI 4.2% YoY May) creates near-term headwind but SPY held up well relative to tech.

sources.headline: Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Fall, Oil Rises as U.S.-Iran Conflict Escalates
SP500 June 10 open up or down — CPI inflation, Iran strikes

decisions.invalidation: Iran conflict escalates to direct military confrontation causing oil spike above $120, or CPI data triggers Fed hawkish pivot

summary: First session: inherited 4 positions (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA/SPY), all tech underwater; held all on WWDC-catalyst-already-fired logic + near-max gross exposure + risk-off macro (Iran+CPI). No trades.
open_theses: AAPL: WWDC Siri AI delay is priced in at $290; watching fall 2026 rollout and antitrust developments for direction — bear floor $215 is key level
MSFT: Cloud/AI earnings strength is real; waiting for FTC noise to clear and next earnings to re-rate
NVDA: Strongest fundamental case in portfolio; flat SMA is advisory, holding for $298 analyst target; watching hyperscaler capex commentary
SPY: Core anchor position; watching Iran/oil situation and July FOMC for macro direction
